metrics.desc:

Token standard: ERC20 / ERC677
Supply fixed or mutable: Fixed

metrics.name: Token integrity
metrics.desc:
The canonical token contract appears simple, fixed, and mature.
No obvious admin controls or mutability risks were identified.
Remaining risks are mostly ecosystem-level, not token-core risks.

metrics.name: Governance integrity
metrics.desc:
Governance model: Hybrid multisig and timelock model
Data Feed upgrades: Multisig-coordinated
Staking upgrades: Timelocked
Reserve withdrawals: Timelocked
Governance affects token economics: Yes
Governance affects staking and payment systems: Yes
Emergency controls exist: Yes
Governance can materially alter token role: Yes
Review or veto mechanisms: Timelocks and unstake windows
Major governance processes documented: Yes

metrics.name: Governance integrity
metrics.desc:
Governance is concentrated in operational roles rather than open tokenholder control.
Timelocks and process constraints mitigate some of this risk.
Admin discretion still creates meaningful governance risk.
